name: Pyramid — Evidence-Based Medicine Hierarchy
input: Show the evidence hierarchy pyramid for evidence-based medicine. Bottom to top: Expert Opinion, Case Reports, Case-Control Studies, Cohort Studies, Randomized Controlled Trials, Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Expert Opinion, Case Reports, Case-Control, Cohort, RCT, Systematic Reviews)
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Pyramid layers from base to apex
napkinBenchmark: Stacked triangle shape with 6 horizontal layers, widest at bottom (Expert Opinion) to narrowest at top (Systematic Reviews). Color gradient warm to cool.

data.title: Evidence-Based Medicine Hierarchy

items.label: Systematic Reviews & Meta-Analyses
items.description: Highest quality evidence synthesizing multiple studies

items.label: Randomized Controlled Trials
items.description: Gold standard for establishing causation with random assignment

items.label: Cohort Studies
items.description: Prospective observation of exposed vs unexposed groups

items.label: Case-Control Studies
items.description: Retrospective comparison of cases with matched controls

items.label: Case Reports
items.description: Detailed reports of individual patient cases

items.label: Expert Opinion
items.description: Professional judgment based on clinical experience

data.caption: Levels of evidence from weakest (base) to strongest (apex)
